codeReview.summary: Pass. This fix directly addresses the prior blocking review finding from `fix-ingest-class-scrutiny`: `Ingest.batch()` now performs the same `table_info.is_lookup` check that `Ingest.row()` already had, and it raises `LookupTableError` before entering the batch loop or calling `deep_upsert()`. The companion regression tests cover the required negative path (`units`) plus additional lookup tables and a positive non-lookup `objects` batch case. I did not find any new blocking or non-blocking code issues in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `python-library-worker` procedure says workers must read `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/environment.md`, but the recorded transcript skeleton for session `8e0297c3-c88a-4450-920b-d7248eef9c3d` only shows an `LS` of `.factory/library` before moving on. At the same time, the handoff reports `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, so the procedure and the audit trail are out of sync.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/python-library-worker/SKILL.md` Step 1 requires reading `architecture.md` and `environment.md`. The extracted transcript skeleton for worker session `8e0297c3-c88a-4450-920b-d7248eef9c3d` shows `## Tool: LS { "directory_path": "/Users/tmsincomb/Dropbox (Personal)/repos/quantitative-db/.factory/library" }` but no subsequent `Read` call for either library file before implementation work begins.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Pre-commit formatting is a required step in both `AGENTS.md` and `python-library-worker`, but `.factory/services.yaml` does not expose a formatter/pre-commit command. Workers currently have to remember and type the raw `pre-commit run --files ...` invocation themselves.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/services.yaml` only defines `install`, `test`, `test-unit`, `test-integration`, `test-models`, `typecheck`, `lint`, and `python`. In this feature's handoff, the worker still had to run `cd "/Users/tmsincomb/Dropbox (Personal)/repos/quantitative-db" && pre-commit run --files quantdb/generic_ingest.py test/test_deep_upsert.py` manually.

summary: Pass: commit `3a4639f` closes the prior blocking gap by adding the missing lookup-table guard to `Ingest.batch()` and by adding regression coverage for blocked lookup-table batches plus an allowed non-lookup batch. No new code issues were found in the reviewed diff; I noted one skill-audit mismatch and one services command gap in shared state.
